name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology, installable on **5 platforms** — Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — no new manifest needed), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental `.antigravity/plugin.json` mirroring the Gemini-CLI-extensions importer format). Single `skills/` directory shared across all platform manifests. **v3.7.0** is the install-surface expansion. **v3.6.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests — see `docs/cross-platform-install.md`. **v3.5.0** (May 2026) is a post-Google-I/O + EU-Article-50-draft modernisation: (1) Google AI Mode added as a first-class AEO/GEO surface across `aeo-audit`, `aeo-geo`, `ai-visibility-audit.md`, `geo-monitor`, and `geo-tracker.py` — 6 platforms, not 5; (2) May 2026 broad core update triage guidance added to `seo-audit` and `tech-seo-audit`; (3) EU AI Act Article 50 draft implementing guidelines (8 May 2026) + 3 June 2026 consultation deadline added to `compliance-rules.md` §1.1b.i; (4) Meta Advantage+ Leads (now global), Threads ads global rollout, and tightened brand-safety controls added to ad campaign workflow; (5) Gemini Omni, Nano Banana Pro, and Veo 3.1 added as recommended AI image/video models in `ad-creative`, `content-brief`, `creative-testing-framework`, `influencer-brief` with mandatory C2PA + Article 50 disclosure clauses; (6) Claude Code v2.1.149+ `/usage` per-model breakdown added to `agency-dashboard` and `claude-interfaces.md` for brand-attributable AI cost tracking. v3.4 shipped end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, unified ads-platform MCPs, explicit parallel subagent dispatch (4–6× parallelism), and an Anthropic Software Directory submission packet. v3.3 modernized May 2026 reality across privacy/compliance, channel mechanics, and AEO/GEO. 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 150 skills, 71 Python scripts, 10 top-level commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.
